_comment: LEX Extension Namespace Registry — Community-maintained, advisory only. NOT a required approval gate. See specs/LEX_EXTENSION_STANDARD.md §9 for governance rules.

_governance.maintainer: LEX Community (open contributions via pull request)
_governance.rejectionPolicy: Only rejected for: (1) collision with lex.core.* reserved prefix, or (2) demonstrably malicious content impersonating another registered organization.

namespaces.description: LEX standard extensions for electric vehicle specifications, charging, range, and tax credit eligibility.
LEX standard extensions for cross-platform deduplication signals and fingerprinting.
LEX standard extensions for lead intelligence, behavioral signals, and intent scoring.
LEX standard extensions for customer consent records (GDPR, TCPA, CCPA, PIPEDA).
LEX standard extensions for transport resilience: TTL, retry, dead-letter queue signals.

LEX standard extensions for real estate procurement leads: property attributes (typed), listing info (MLS, agents), property pricing (list/offer/appraisal/closing), mortgage pre-qualification, co-applicant support, escrow tracking, and viewing history.

LEX standard extensions for aircraft procurement leads: aircraft technical spec (ICAO type, engine, MTOW, range, seat config), production slot/delivery position, regulatory and type certificate data (FAA/EASA), ECA/EETC financing structures, technical evaluation stages, and airline fleet context.

LEX standard extensions for vessel procurement leads: vessel specification (type, DWT, GT, fuel, speed), broker information (role and commission — mandatory in maritime), shipyard details (hull number, keel, progress payments), classification requirements (class society notation, MARPOL), maritime financing (Korea/Norwegian ECA, bareboat charter), and charter context.

LEX standard extensions for heavy equipment procurement leads: equipment specification (category, operating weight, engine tier, bucket capacity), attachments with weighted priority, job site context (terrain, elevation, climate), utilization requirements (hours/day, duty cycle), service and telematics plan, and site demonstration request tracking.

LEX standard extensions for enterprise technology procurement leads: procurement model (DaaS, SaaS, lease, outright purchase), device specification (typed hardware attributes), software bundle and license model, MDM/deployment configuration, compliance certification requirements (ISO 27001, SOC2, FedRAMP, GDPR DPA), integration requirements (ERP, IAM, ITSM), and DaaS/subscription term parameters.

instructions: 2. Add your entry to the 'namespaces' array following the schema below.
3. Submit a pull request. No approval fee. No editorial review of content.
4. Your namespace is VALID whether or not it appears here.
This registry is for discoverability only.

entrySchema.description: Brief description of what data this namespace carries
entrySchema.specRef: Optional URL or path to your extension's spec documentation
entrySchema.latestVersion: semver string of your current latest extension version
entrySchema.schemaUri: Optional URL to a JSON Schema for your extension data object
